caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black over-ear headset with a boom microphone speaks against a plain, light-colored wall. In the initial sequence, he looks upward and slightly to his right with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze forward and begins gesturing with his hands to emphasize his speech, raising them to waist level. By the final sequence, he is looking directly forward with an open mouth, raising both hands higher and spreading his fingers wide in an expressive gesture. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in small white font in the bottom left corner of each individual segment. No other people or objects are visible in the setting.
